seed.description: Baseline recall test: dialogue contains 3 unambiguous explicit awareness signals across 3 different dimensions. Tests whether the agent reliably triggers update_awareness when signals are textbook clear.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: I need help drafting a weekly report template for my team.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Sure. What kind of structure do you have in mind, and how long is each section?

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Please always keep things concise — bullet points only, no long paragraphs. This applies to everything we work on, not just the report.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood. From now on I'll default to bullet points and keep responses tight unless you ask for more detail.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Section 1 should be 'Last week's outcomes'. Draft something for me.
From now on, always show me a draft before finalizing anything. I want to review before you commit.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — I'll always present a draft for your review first, no auto-finalizing.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Section 2 is 'This week's plan'. Draft it.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Goal A: ...
- Goal B: ...
- Risks to flag: ...

Draft above for your review.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: You're my weekly-reporting copilot — focus only on weekly cadence things. Don't suggest monthly or quarterly stuff unless I ask.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood. Scoping strictly to weekly cadence going forward.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Looks good. Save this template for next time.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Saved. Ready when you need next week's report.

qa_items.question: What is my preferred response format?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Concise, bullet points, no long paragraphs.

qa_items.question: Should you finalize edits without my review?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: No. Always show me a draft first before finalizing.

qa_items.question: What is your role in our work together?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Weekly-reporting copilot — focused on weekly cadence, not monthly or quarterly unless asked.
